name: Jethro Monroe / Clinical 16-bit v8.1
description: SURGICAL HARD-LOCK: Deterministic Anchoring + Tighter Achromatic Purge. (1) THREE DETERMINISTIC ANCHORS: Yellow L=88,a=-6,b=85 / Pink L=70,a=60,b=-30 / Blue L=40,a=5,b=-45 (hard-locked production inks, no averaging). (2) TIGHTER Achromatic Purge chromaGateThreshold=15.0 (if C<15, physically set a=b=0 - turns Jethro's head to pure B/W BEFORE quantization, mathematically impossible to recruit yellow/pink pixels). (3) Lightness Crowbar lWeight=200.0 (forces halftone head to Gray/Black plates). (4) Identity Pruning densityFloor=0.05 (kills noise plates <5%). (5) CIE76 blunt metric. Deterministic anchoring keeps cat out of rectangles AND keeps colors clinical.
